product.title: 12 Colors Cream Concealer Foundation Palette, Long-Wearing Smudge Proof Blendable Full Coverage Cream Contour Blush Highlighter Color Correcting Concealer Foundation Palette Makeup
featureBullets: 【12 Colors Concealer】12 colors of the concealer cream, give you more choices for choosing the color that fit your skin tone.

【Lasts for All Day Long】The creamy concealer is silky smooth with added moisturizing ingredients and is super easy to apply. A creamy concealer that adheres to the skin in a natural color that leaves makeup looking natural and radiant. All-day waterproof, sweat-proof, stain-proof, and don't worry about removing makeup.

【Multiple Usages】Perfect for freckles and darker skin tones, it can also be used as a base for neutral eyeshadow. The creamy texture adheres perfectly to the skin, covering dark circles, spots, blemishes and uneven skin tone. It can also be used as a contouring plate to contour the face. At the same time, it also creates three-dimensional facial features, and the makeup effect is long-lasting.

【Easy To Carry】Packed in a stylish, travel-friendly palette, it's super easy to carry around, perfect for everyday use or traveling. You can mix the colors that suit your skin tone and blend perfectly with your skin.

【How to Use】When you first time to use this product, use your finger activate the cream in circles to make it moist. Then apply it evenly with your finger or brush or a powder puff. If the cream is alway waxy&dry, just use a hair dryer to warm the pots, then they will applied nicely.
product.description: Product Description: Packing Size: 10.7*8.5*1.7cm/4.2*3.3*0.67in Weight: 123g/4.3oz Package Included: 12 colors concealer palette Skin Type: All Skin Features: 1.12 colors concealer cream for your choice. 2.Natural color and smooth. 3.Waterproof and long lasting. 4.Perfect gift for your family or friends. Warm Tips : 1.Please keep this product out of reach of children. 2.If you feel any uncomfortable please stop using it. 3.Due to photography angle, light or other reasons, there may be slight differences between the pictures and the real product.Please refer to the real product. If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us. We promise to provide you with the best and prompt service if you need any help.

specification.value: #30,272 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #283 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers love the color palette and find the concealer has a smooth, silky feel that's not too heavy. The product receives positive feedback for its blendability and application, with one customer noting it's easy to apply. The coverage and quality receive mixed reviews, with some customers finding it provides good coverage while others say it's too sheer, and some praising the fabulous quality while others find it lacking. The longevity and oiliness aspects also get mixed reactions, with some customers saying it's not oily while others find it a bit oily.

reviews.reviewText: Very good quality! The textures are creamy and easy to work with. Perfect for correcting, highlighting, and sculpting. I recommend it!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on July 7, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I have already purchased this makeup pallet twice and in two different colors. I love the many color options and the all in one use. I even recommended it to my mom and she now uses it too. Also is great to travel with. Will definitely keep purchasing
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on July 19, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Product is great for the price, is a really mild coverage
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 20, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Goes on my face so smooth. You can barely tell im wearing any makeup with this contour concealer. 9/10
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 11, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Oily does not feel good and coverage is minimal
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 4, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Don't rub off well with my makeup brush. To impact
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 6, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Love the colorsof this makeup pallet. Was easy to apply, and blend plus it stayed on all day, so the quality is fabulous! I thought the item was reasonably priced for the size/quantity. I also did not notice any breakouts or rashes after use.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on June 15, 2024

reviews.reviewText: I really like this cream palette—the colors are beautiful, there’s a nice variety, and they blend very well. Unfortunately, the case is terrible. It’s extremely difficult to open, and when I try with my nails, they end up digging into the cream because of the force it takes to get it open. It doesn’t open gently at all, so I’ve had to resort to using a screwdriver just to push the tab and get it open. This is really frustrating and inconvenient. Because of that, I won’t be purchasing this cream palette again, which is a shame since the colors and texture are great. The case just really sucks!!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on September 5, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I love it! I use it as light foundation it's perfect for my dry skin.
Creamy pretty buttery formula can be used as foundation concealer contour. Perfect for a makeup artist, makeup girly or concealer. Lasts months as well!!
suits the purpose exactly as described not high end but does the job
